title: SlashBlade Resharped RenderFix Patch
description: Fixes the blade rendering problem in SlashBlade: Resharped
body:
# [SLASHBLADE: RESHARPED](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-resharped) VERSION 1.1.5 HAS FIXED THIS ISSUE. DO NOT USE THIS PATCH.
---

This mod fixes the blade rendering problem in [SlashBlade: Resharped](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-resharped).([#18](https://github.com/0999312/SlashBlade_Resharped/issues/18))
